allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($node\){"node: $\($node.Source\)"}else{"node: 無"}; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py\){"python: $\($py.Source\)"}else{"python: 無"}; $py3 = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py3\){"py: $\($py3.Source\)"}else{"py: 無"})

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8099,8098 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch { "could not kill $_" } }; Remove-Item 'C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\sunnywarmth-website\\.claude\\launch.json' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\sunnywarmth-website\\.claude\\launch.json'\) { 'launch.json still exists' } else { 'launch.json removed' })
